message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
' version: 1.20201212.3
' skinparam: default
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

class Airport {
    <<Thread>>
    list<Runway> lst_runways
    list<AirportOperation> lst_operations
    bool permission_to_take_off(Airplane)
    bool permission_to_land(Airplane)
    void start_thread()
}

class Runway {
    uint32_t id
    RunwayState state
}

class AirportOperation {
    Runway run_way
    Airplane airplane
    uint32_t time_request
    uint32_t time_last_update
    EnumAirportOperation operation_state
    void free_runway()
}

class Airplane {
    <<Thread>>
    uint32_t id
    uint32_t fuel
    uint32_t fuel_consumption_rate
    uint32_t airport_answer_timeout
    AirplaneState state
    void start_thread()
    void take_off_authorized()
    void take_off_denied()
    void land_authorized()
    void land_denied()
}

enum RunwayState {
    Free
    InUse
}

enum AirplaneState {
    Stopped
    AskingPermissionToTakeOff
    TakingOff
    Flying
    AskingPermissionToLand
    Landing
    Crashed
}

enum EnumAirportOperation {
    WaitingToTakeOff
    AuthorizedToTakeOff
    WaitingToLand
    AuthorizedToLand
}

note right of Airport::start_thread()
Iterate through lst_operations
if it matches the criteria that airplane is already flying
release runway
update airplane status and related info
order lst_operations to update next events
end note

Airport *-- Runway : "lst_runways"
Airport *-- AirportOperation : "lst_operations"
AirportOperation o-- Runway : "run_way"
AirportOperation o-- Airplane : "airplane"
AirportOperation *-- EnumAirportOperation : "operation_state"
Airplane *-- AirplaneState : "state"
Runway *-- RunwayState : "state"

@enduml
```
